step_rationale: Microbiota-dependent metabolite; reduced biosynthesis associates with CAD via FXR/TGR5 signaling and systemic inflammation.
mechanism: Decreased bile-acid biosynthesis in CAD impairs FXR/TGR5-mediated anti-inflammatory signaling, exacerbating vascular inflammation in MI.

references.title: Comprehensive Metabolomic Characterization of Coronary Artery Diseases.
references.journal: Journal of the American College of Cardiology
